styleTemplate: Vintage woodcut engraving print, sporting newspaper illustration. [SCENE]. The hero player is rendered in dark detailed ink; any background figures are noticeably lighter and sketchier. Aged cream paper (#F5F1E6), dark sepia-black ink (#2C281F), fine parallel hatching and cross-hatching. Modern athletic players, contemporary plain kits, no logos, no numbers. The football is the ONLY red element (#B23B2E). Faint hatched ground shadow, no other scenery. No text, no borders, no arrows, no diagrams. Generous margins. Same engraving style, line weight and paper tone as the reference image. 3:4 portrait.

archetypes.scene: Hero deep in his own half striking a long raking pass; the ball sails high over two faint distant opponents
Hero standing with one foot on the ball, head up, pointing to direct play (anchor image)
Hero turning out of a pressing trap with the ball, two faint opponents lunging at him from both sides
Hero clipping a through-pass; the ball rolls through the gap between two faint defenders into open space
Hero at the touchline whipping a deep cross; a faint teammate attacks the far post in the background
Hero behind a placed free-kick ball; a faint three-man defensive wall jumps in the background
Hero with his back to goal cushioning a lay-off; a faint teammate arrives onto the pass at speed
Hero nutmegging a faint wrong-footed defender, flamboyant body shape
Hero bursting between two faint beaten opponents with the ball glued to his feet
Hero squaring up a faint crouched full-back one-on-one, ball rolled under his studs
Hero in a flat-out sprint chasing the ball knocked ahead; a faint trailing opponent is left far behind
Hero breaking away with the ball; faint scattered opponents behind him still turning around
Hero darting past the shoulder of a faint last defender as the ball arcs over the top toward him
Hero sprinting around the outside of a faint teammate on the ball, calling for the release
Hero stabbing the ball home at the near post; faint wrong-footed goalkeeper and goal frame behind
Hero striking a mid-air scissor volley; faint goal frame in the background
Hero arriving at the edge of the box to smash a loose bouncing ball first time; faint cluster of players behind
Hero in full follow-through from long range; faint goal with a stretching keeper far in the distance
Hero bending a curling shot with his instep, a faint beaten defender left behind on the outside
Hero out-jumping a faint opponent to power a header, both airborne, hero clearly higher
Hero chesting the ball down with a broad planted stance while a faint defender leans on his back
Hero winning a shoulder-to-shoulder duel against a faint opponent, ball between their feet
Hero calmly stepping across a faint attacker to intercept a rolling pass
Hero sprinting back goal-side of a faint attacker in possession, closing the gap
Hero in a full sliding tackle cleanly taking the ball off a faint opponent
Hero pressed tight against the back of a faint attacker trying to receive, denying the turn
Hero standing tall and poking the ball away from a faint dribbler with a calm standing tackle
Hero mid-lunge closing down a faint panicked opponent on the ball
Hero striding on strongly while faint opponents stand bent over exhausted behind him
Hero leaping high chest-first for a dropping ball, explosive full-body athletic extension
Hero with a captain's armband barking orders and pointing; faint teammates align into a defensive line behind
Hero roaring with clenched fists over a won ball; a faint beaten opponent sits on the ground behind
Hero goalkeeper at full horizontal stretch fingertipping the ball away; goal frame behind him
Hero goalkeeper at the edge of his area side-volleying a precise pass out, composed like an outfielder
Hero goalkeeper rising above two faint attackers to claim a high cross with both hands; goal frame behind
Hero goalkeeper far outside his area sliding to clear the ball ahead of a faint onrushing attacker
